requirement_topic.en: ANDE Grid-Connection Gate — Anti-Islanding, Utility Interface, and 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: ANDE并网门槛——防孤岛、公用电网接口及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: ANDE併網門檻——防孤島、公用電網介面及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V參數

summary.en: Paraguay's electricity service is practically centred on ANDE, the state electricity administration responsible for generation, transmission, distribution, and project connection review. For grid-tied PV inverters, the practical market gate is ANDE technical approval for the specific installation and connection point. Evidence commonly expected should be prepared around IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface behaviour, applicable IEC 61000 power-quality limits, and firmware settings for Paraguay's low-voltage grid, commonly stated as 220/380 V at 50 Hz. Because Paraguay has no large mature solar-inverter approval list comparable to some larger PV markets, exporters should treat ANDE's project-specific connection conditions as controlling.
summary.zh: 巴拉圭电力服务实际上以国家电力管理局ANDE为中心，ANDE负责发电、输电、配电及项目接入审查。对于并网光伏逆变器，实际市场门槛是特定装置及接入点取得ANDE技术批准。通常应围绕IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口行为、适用IEC 61000电能质量限值，以及巴拉圭低压电网常见的220/380 V、50 Hz固件参数准备证据。由于巴拉圭尚未形成类似部分大型光伏市场的成熟逆变器批准清单，出口商应将ANDE项目特定接入条件视为控制性要求。
summary.zht: 巴拉圭電力服務實際上以國家電力管理局ANDE為中心，ANDE負責發電、輸電、配電及項目接入審查。對於併網光伏逆變器，實際市場門檻是特定裝置及接入點取得ANDE技術批准。通常應圍繞IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面行為、適用IEC 61000電能品質限值，以及巴拉圭低壓電網常見的220/380 V、50 Hz韌體參數準備證據。由於巴拉圭尚未形成類似部分大型光伏市場的成熟逆變器批准清單，出口商應將ANDE項目特定接入條件視為控制性要求。

standards_or_laws: ANDE technical connection review and project-specific connection conditions for grid-tied generation
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility and power-quality limits where specified by ANDE or project owner
Paraguay grid setting context — 50 Hz, commonly 220/380 V low-voltage service

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408-2021, domestic anti-islanding tests, and grid-code documentation prepared for State Grid or China Southern Power Grid conditions. These documents are based on Chinese grid procedures and do not by themselves prove acceptance by ANDE. Even where the nominal voltage and frequency appear similar, firmware protection thresholds, reconnection timing, voltage/frequency ride-through, reactive-power behaviour, and documentation language should be reviewed against the Paraguayan project connection conditions.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、国内防孤岛测试，以及针对国家电网或南方电网条件准备的并网文件。上述文件基于中国电网程序，本身不能证明会被ANDE接受。即使标称电压和频率看似相近，固件保护阈值、重连时间、电压/频率穿越、无功行为及文件语言仍应按巴拉圭项目接入条件复核。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、國內防孤島測試，以及針對國家電網或南方電網條件準備的併網文件。上述文件基於中國電網程序，本身不能證明會被ANDE接受。即使標稱電壓和頻率看似相近，韌體保護閾值、重連時間、電壓/頻率穿越、無功行為及文件語言仍應按巴拉圭項目接入條件複核。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese grid certificates are not an ANDE connection approval. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence for the specific inverter model, a firmware settings table for Paraguay's 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V grid, protection relay and reconnection settings, Spanish technical documentation where required, and a project-level submission path through the local owner, designer, or installer. ANDE may impose project-specific conditions because distributed self-consumption solar is still emerging in Paraguay.
gap.zh: 差距：中国并网证书不是ANDE接入批准。出口商应为特定逆变器型号准备IEC 62116及IEC 61727证据、针对巴拉圭50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V电网的固件参数表、保护继电器和重连设置、在需要时提供西班牙语技术文件，并通过当地业主、设计方或安装方向ANDE提交项目级申请。由于巴拉圭分布式自发自用太阳能仍处于发展阶段，ANDE可能提出项目特定条件。
gap.zht: 差距：中國併網證書不是ANDE接入批准。出口商應為特定逆變器型號準備IEC 62116及IEC 61727證據、針對巴拉圭50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V電網的韌體參數表、保護繼電器和重連設置、在需要時提供西班牙語技術文件，並通過當地業主、設計方或安裝方向ANDE提交項目級申請。由於巴拉圭分散式自發自用太陽能仍處於發展階段，ANDE可能提出項目特定條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid connection: ANDE technical approval and connection conditions control the project connection gate
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence may support engineering review in China but does not transfer automatically to ANDE Paraguay acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat ANDE technical approval as the controlling Paraguay grid-connection gate. Chinese GB/T or NB/T grid evidence should be supplemented with IEC 62116, IEC 61727, applicable IEC 61000 evidence, firmware settings for Paraguay's 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V grid, and project-specific documentation requested by ANDE.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将ANDE技术批准视为巴拉圭并网的控制性门槛。中国GB/T或NB/T并网证据应补充IEC 62116、IEC 61727、适用IEC 61000证据、针对巴拉圭50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V电网的固件参数，以及ANDE要求的项目特定文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將ANDE技術批准視為巴拉圭併網的控制性門檻。中國GB/T或NB/T併網證據應補充IEC 62116、IEC 61727、適用IEC 61000證據、針對巴拉圭50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V電網的韌體參數，以及ANDE要求的項目特定文件。

requirement_topic.en: Paraguay Solar Context — Hydro-Dominant Grid and Nascent Distributed Self-Consumption
requirement_topic.zh: 巴拉圭太阳能背景——水电主导电网及初期分布式自发自用
requirement_topic.zht: 巴拉圭太陽能背景——水電主導電網及初期分散式自發自用

summary.en: Paraguay's electricity system is hydro-dominant, with major supply from the Itaipu and Yacyreta binational hydroelectric projects and surplus electricity historically exported to neighbouring countries. This context means solar PV inverter acceptance is less likely to be handled through a long-standing mass-market product approval programme and more likely to be reviewed through ANDE project connection, owner procurement, and local engineering documentation. For Chinese exporters, the key practical question is not only whether the inverter has IEC test reports, but whether the local project team can use those reports to obtain ANDE connection clearance.
summary.zh: 巴拉圭电力系统以水电为主，主要供应来自Itaipu和Yacyreta两座双边水电项目，历史上存在向邻国出口的电力盈余。在此背景下，太阳能光伏逆变器准入较少可能通过长期成熟的大众产品批准计划处理，更可能通过ANDE项目接入、业主采购和当地工程文件进行审查。对中国出口商而言，关键实际问题不仅是逆变器是否具有IEC测试报告，还在于当地项目团队能否用这些报告取得ANDE接入许可。
summary.zht: 巴拉圭電力系統以水電為主，主要供應來自Itaipu和Yacyreta兩座雙邊水電項目，歷史上存在向鄰國出口的電力盈餘。在此背景下，太陽能光伏逆變器准入較少可能通過長期成熟的大眾產品批准計畫處理，更可能通過ANDE項目接入、業主採購和當地工程文件進行審查。對中國出口商而言，關鍵實際問題不僅是逆變器是否具有IEC測試報告，還在於當地項目團隊能否用這些報告取得ANDE接入許可。

standards_or_laws: ANDE project-level connection and technical review for electricity installations connected to its network
Project-owner procurement specifications for PV inverters, commonly referencing IEC 62109, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and IEC 62920
Local electrical design and installation documentation required by the Paraguayan project owner or utility reviewer

summary.en: China has mature domestic PV deployment, manufacturer certification, and utility interconnection practices. Chinese inverter files often contain CQC or CGC voluntary certificates, CNAS laboratory reports, GB/T 37408-2021 performance and safety evidence, NB/T 32004 technical evidence, and GB/T 19964-2024 grid-integration evidence. That package can be technically useful, but it is not a Paraguay project approval package unless mapped into IEC/NP terminology and accepted by the local project reviewer and ANDE.
summary.zh: 中国拥有成熟的国内光伏部署、制造商认证和电网接入实践。中国逆变器文件通常包含CQC或CGC自愿认证、CNAS实验室报告、GB/T 37408-2021性能和安全证据、NB/T 32004技术证据及GB/T 19964-2024并网证据。该文件包具有技术参考价值，但除非被转换为IEC/NP术语并被当地项目审查方和ANDE接受，否则不是巴拉圭项目批准文件包。
summary.zht: 中國擁有成熟的國內光伏部署、製造商認證和電網接入實踐。中國逆變器文件通常包含CQC或CGC自願認證、CNAS實驗室報告、GB/T 37408-2021性能和安全證據、NB/T 32004技術證據及GB/T 19964-2024併網證據。該文件包具有技術參考價值，但除非被轉換為IEC/NP術語並被當地項目審查方和ANDE接受，否則不是巴拉圭項目批准文件包。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: a China domestic PV inverter compliance dossier should be converted into a Paraguay project dossier. That means Spanish or bilingual technical summaries, IEC/NP cross-reference tables, model-family coverage explanations, firmware configuration records, and clear identification of the local applicant responsible for ANDE connection review. The absence of a mature mass-market solar approval pathway increases the importance of early ANDE and project-owner confirmation.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内光伏逆变器合规档案应转换为巴拉圭项目档案。这意味着需要西班牙语或双语技术摘要、IEC/NP交叉引用表、型号系列覆盖说明、固件配置记录，以及明确负责ANDE接入审查的当地申请人。由于缺乏成熟的大众太阳能产品批准路径，尽早取得ANDE和项目业主确认尤为重要。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內光伏逆變器合規檔案應轉換為巴拉圭項目檔案。這意味著需要西班牙語或雙語技術摘要、IEC/NP交叉引用表、型號系列覆蓋說明、韌體配置記錄，以及明確負責ANDE接入審查的當地申請人。由於缺乏成熟的大眾太陽能產品批准路徑，儘早取得ANDE和項目業主確認尤為重要。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but practically mandatory before energisation where the inverter is connected to ANDE's network
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic certificates and grid documents remain China-market evidence and do not create a Paraguay connection entitlement

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Paraguay's hydro-dominant, ANDE-centred electricity system makes project-level connection review the practical route for grid-tied PV inverters. Convert China domestic evidence into an IEC/NP and ANDE-ready technical dossier before shipment, and confirm the local applicant and connection process early.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴拉圭以水电为主、以ANDE为中心的电力系统，使项目级接入审查成为并网光伏逆变器的实际路径。出货前应将中国国内证据转换为适合IEC/NP和ANDE审查的技术档案，并尽早确认当地申请人和接入流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴拉圭以水電為主、以ANDE為中心的電力系統，使項目級接入審查成為併網光伏逆變器的實際路徑。出貨前應將中國國內證據轉換為適合IEC/NP和ANDE審查的技術檔案，並儘早確認當地申請人和接入流程。
